scripts.setup:db: cd server && node -e "import('./db/index.js').then(m => require('fs').readFileSync('./db/schema.sql','utf8').split(';').filter(s=>s.trim()).reduce((p,s)=>p.then(()=>m.default.query(s)),Promise.resolve())).then(()=>{ console.log('DB schema applied'); process.exit(0); }).catch(e=>{ console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.vercel-build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
